prompt: How has the average overall evaluation rating changed per academic year?

inputData.question: How has the average overall evaluation rating changed per academic year?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"How has the average overall evaluation rating changed per academic year?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"How has the average overall evaluation rating changed per academic year?"},"startedAt":1771856094737,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants to see how the average overall evaluation rating has changed per academic year. I need to join course_evaluations with enrollments and course_sections to get the academic_year, then group by academic_year and calculate the average of overall_rating. The course_sections table contains the academic_year field, and course_evaluations contains the overall_rating. I'll order by academic_year to show the trend over time.","sql":"
SELECT 
  cs.academic_year,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
GROUP BY cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC
","assumptions":["The academic_year field in course_sections represents the academic year for each course section","overall_rating is a numeric field representing the evaluation rating","We are aggregating all evaluations across all courses and professors for each academic year"]},"endedAt":1771856123042},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

visualization.title: Average Overall Evaluation Rating by Academic Year

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  cs.academic_year,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
GROUP BY cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC

visualization.title: Average Overall Evaluation Rating by Academic Year

result.sql:
SELECT 
  cs.academic_year,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
GROUP BY cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC
